**Action** - {t}: **Attack**. Activate this only if you control a Lightning attack.

When this hits a hero, deal 1 arcane damage to them.

When this attacks a hero, deal 1 arcane damage to them. If damage is dealt this way, this gets **go again**.

**Instant** - {r}: This gets **go again**.

**Quickstrike** - If this has go again, it gets +1{p}.

When this hits a hero, deal 1 arcane damage to them.
The next time you would be dealt damage this turn, prevent 2 of that damage. If you prevent damage this way, create a Flurry token.

Deal 5 arcane damage to any target.

If this deals damage, you may {t} your hero. If you do, create a Ponder token.
